Original: Pillaging takes 1 [Turn|TURN] and provides a lump sum of [Resources|RESOURCE] as plunder, but damages the target [Structure|STRUCTURE] until it's Repaired. Pillaging a [Farm|FARM] or [SETTLEMENT] also provides free
Translation: 劫掠需要 1 [回合|TURN]，并一次性获得一批[资源|RESOURCE]作为战利品，但会损坏目标[建筑|STRUCTURE]，直到其被修复。劫掠[农场|FARM]或[SETTLEMENT]还会免费提供
Note: Trial Common Concepts pillage help text; preserves concept IDs.

Original: at any time. Adding a [CATAPULT] to a Siege can greatly accelerate the process.[BLANK-LINE]A Siege can only be performed by an Army which outnumbers its opponent (in terms of number of [Warrior Units|WARRIOR]).
